# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest release is supported with security fixes.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Use GitHub Security Advisories for private reporting:
https://github.com/sohrabbehdani/feedy/security/advisories

If advisories are unavailable, contact:
sohrab.behdani@proton.me

Include reproduction steps, impact, and any proof of concept.
